name: Cullman Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Cullman Bancorp, Inc. focuses on operating as a holding company for the Cullman Savings Bank that provides various banking products and services in Cullman County. It offers checking, savings, and individual retirement accounts, as well as certificates of deposit accounts. The company also provides one- to four-family residential real estate, commercial real estate, commercial and industrial, construction, multi-family real estate, and consumer loans; and invests in securities. It serves customers from its main office and two additional branch offices located in Cullman, Alabama, as well as one branch office in Hanceville, Alabama. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Cullman, Alabama. Cullman Bancorp, Inc. is a subsidiary of Cullman Savings Bank, MHC.
